_comment: Gold table for grounded parameter extraction (mustread.txt §9). Each entry is a verifiable factual parameter and its ground-truth value, used by `agora_rag build --report-grounding` to compute extraction_accuracy and grounding_rate. Values are facts from the cited US-federal standard (public domain).

ctr_threshold.standard: FinCEN 31 CFR 1010.311 — Filing obligations for reports of transactions in currency (CTR > $10,000)
ctr_threshold.evidence: transaction in currency of more than $10,000

sar_threshold.standard: FinCEN 31 CFR 1020.320 — Reports by banks of suspicious transactions (SAR >= $5,000)
sar_threshold.evidence: involves or aggregates at least $5,000 in funds
